proof.authorityBlock: Built by the TriumphantHQ internal team using the exact techniques that built our own digital offerings. Our goal is to equip you with tools that just work.
evidenceBullets: built from real internal product systems

trainingPage.supportingLine: A practical framework for building, packaging, and promoting a digital product with AI support.

offerPage.headline: Digital Forge Side Hustle Starter System

faq.question: Who is this for?
faq.answer: This is for builders who want a practical digital product workflow without getting overwhelmed by AI tools.

faq.question: Do I need technical skills?
faq.answer: No. The system covers everything step-by-step from prompt generation to final packaging.
